poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group that was scaled out.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

scalingDecisionId.description: Optional identifier for the scaling decision event, useful for correlating with related events.

previousCapacity.description: Previous capacity (total instance count) before scaling out.

newCapacity.description: New capacity (total instance count) after scaling out.

instancesProvisioned.description: Number of new instances provisioned during this scale-out operation.

queueDepth.description: Queue depth at the time the scale-out decision was made.

queueDepthThreshold.description: Queue depth threshold that triggered the scale-out operation.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this scaling operation, such as autoscaler version, rule identifiers, or scaling algorithm details.
